svg.text: DB Perf AI Agent — High Level Design
System architecture: Browser → EC2 (Nginx + FastAPI + LangGraph) → OpenAI GPT-4o · EC2 t3.large · us-west-1 · dbperf.aieksops.com
DATA SOURCES — AWS RDS Performance Data
JSON export · Top SQL · Wait events
Text report · SQL ordered by DB time
DB credentials held in browser memory only · never persisted to server · HITL confirmation required before every SQL execution
stream_chat() · full incident context in system prompt · SSE tokens
Creates draft KB article for DBA review
Docker Compose: backend(8400)·frontend(8401)·nginx(80/443)·certbot · New: DB Connector(HITL)·ServiceNow KB·DBA Copilot
